case_title: CHI LUNG KUI VS. JACE A. ESQUIVEL ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $68.00) SERVED MAY-31-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, JACE A.
REC'D LETTER FROM DEFT CLAIMING SHE WAS INCORRECTLY NAMED AND REQUESTS DISMISSAL, LETTER PLACED IN FILE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUI, CHI LUNG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, LARISSA SEDANO, MICHAEL $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $375.00, THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT'S TOTAL DAMAGES ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE ACCIDENT TO BE $1500.00 AND ALLOCATES 20% OF THE FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT TO DEFENDANT'S FOR A TOTAL NET AWARD OF $300.00 PLUS COSTS. (DEFENDANT MICHAEL SEDANO'S MOTION TO POSTPONE TRIAL REJECTED AS UNTIMELY FILED AND NOT SERVIED ON THE PLAINTIFF. MOTION IS DENIED.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE (SUBSTITUTED) ON JUNE 08, 2008 FILED. (SERVICE FEE $59.50)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, JACE A.
PER COMMISSIONER, DEFENDANT CAN APPEAR THROUGH TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $59.50) SERVED OCT-05-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, LARISSA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, LARISSA SEDANO, MICHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST TO POSTPONE TO SEP-09-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER, COPIES SENT TO ALL PARTIES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $59.50) SERVED OCT-04-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SEDANO, MICHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KUI, CHI LUNG AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, JACE A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK P. SCHREIBER. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT LARISSA ESQUIVEL PRESENT. CO-DEFENDANT MICHAEL SEDANO NOT PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM NOTH SIDES RETAINED. LARRY LEE INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF KUI, CHI LUNG
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE, REC'D AND FILED. INSTRUCTIONS SENT TO PARTY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2008 - CONTINUED TO OCT-28-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD THE FOLLOWING DEFENDANT'S: (1) LARISSA ESQUIVEL, 1264-A 35TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA; AND (2) MICHAEL SEDANO, 1700 18TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122. DEFENDANT JACE ESQUIVEL DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 28, 2008 AT 3:30 P.M. FOR TRIAL; PLAINTIFF SHALL TIMELY SERVE THE NEW PARTIES DEFENDANT.
